name: Raided by Orcs
description:
She(137) raided your village and's gonna breed you.

You are just a guy/girl who lives in a humble village when your settlement gets attacked by a raiding party of Orcs. G'ruka thinks you're cute, so she'll spare you if you become her pet. She won't humiliate you or anything, just fuck you whenever she wants.

She's not submissive though, so prepare for Snu-Snu.

Please vote on a bot from Jan. 5 to Jan. 7.
creator: _Mavuika_
